headline: Charlotte Tilbury Adds a Wrinkle to Puig, Lauder Merger Talks
summary: According to the Spanish economic and business publication, Expansión, new contractual demands by Charlotte Tilbury are disrupting merger negotiations between Puig and The Estée Lauder Cos.

headline: A 5.18% Warning and a Trillion-Dollar Earnings Call Tonight
summary: The 30-year US Treasury yield touched 5.18% on Tuesday, the highest level since the early days of the 2007 financial crisis. That's not a footnote.
